title: lftp bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:
[4.8.4-7]
- Adding a timeout for TLS close
- Resolves: RHEL-108115 - 'cannot seek on data source' in TLS lftp sessions
full_text:
[4.8.4-7]
- Adding a timeout for TLS close
- Resolves: RHEL-108115 - 'cannot seek on data source' in TLS lftp sessions
